{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Sage's madra
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] mentions [[Sage's madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
